creator: asa@agava.com
text:
On ×Ô, 2006-09-26 at 11:53 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of print/cups-base,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/103672 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 

I will update CUPS to 1.2.4 today.
If it doesn't help, I'll look further.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/103672
>
